notes: The unit is identified offline by the immutable SMG fingerprint: layout 11, model code 30977 (0x7901), rated power 5000.

A complete shadow-learning run matched all 77 SmartESS write attempts to local Modbus writes with no degraded, unknown-field, or unmatched writes; the matched control set is graduated into the built-in model profile as tested.
The model profile extends the SMG 6200 layout-11 family profile, whose register map is backed by the Anenji Protocol No. 3-10 documentation.

known_limitations: Controls are graduated from cloud shadow-learning correlation on real hardware; Home Assistant writes reuse the same registers but have not been separately user-confirmed through the Home Assistant write path.
knowledge_summary: Anenji ANJ-5KW-48V-WIFI resolves to a model-specific SMG layout-11 runtime surface (model code 0x7901, rated 5000 W) with the SmartESS-confirmed control set graduated into the built-in profile from a complete 77/77 shadow-learning run.
